## EU5 / Project Caesar — External Control Modding Feasibility Research

### 1. Game Status

EU5 (Europa Universalis V) is fully released. It launched on **November 4, 2025** after being developed internally under the codename "Project Caesar" starting around 2020. It was announced May 8, 2025. It is available on Steam (app ID 3450310) and has a live, active modding community.
